subtitles.original: しめやかに深い絆の糸
subtitles.english: Gently, the deep thread of our bond

subtitles.original: 強く強く結ぶ
subtitles.english: Ties us strongly, so strongly

subtitles.original: 瑠璃色に輝く 綺羅の瞳
subtitles.english: Eyes shining in lapis lazuli

subtitles.original: 闇よりの使いに 閉ざされても
subtitles.english: Even if they are sealed by messengers of darkness

subtitles.original: 繋いだ夢の橋 誰も奪えないから
subtitles.english: No one can steal our connected bridge of dreams

subtitles.original: 無限の明日映して
subtitles.english: Reflecting an infinite tomorrow

subtitles.original: 妖し光放つ鳴神に
subtitles.english: Amidst the thunderclouds releasing a mysterious light

subtitles.original: 甘い言葉の蜜 薫り立つ
subtitles.english: The sweet scent of honeyed words rises

subtitles.original: 密か黒い鼓翼 忍び寄る
subtitles.english: Secretly, a dark wing stealthily approaches

subtitles.original: 心臓-鐘-が行き場求め 喘ぎ出す
subtitles.english: The heart's bell groans, seeking a place to go

subtitles.original: 星霜の流れに隠す 歪んだ思惑
subtitles.english: Twisted schemes hidden in the flow of time

subtitles.original: 艶やかに鋭い牙を剥く
subtitles.english: Baring sharp, brilliant fangs

subtitles.original: 巡る巡る悲劇
subtitles.english: Revolving, revolving tragedies

subtitles.original: 玉響に消えゆく 水泡のように
subtitles.english: Disappearing in a fleeting moment like bubbles

subtitles.original: 儚い時 辿る運命なら
subtitles.english: If destiny follows this fleeting time

subtitles.original: 曇りなき刃掲げ 清い詩紡ぐ
subtitles.english: I will raise a cloudless blade and weave a pure song

subtitles.original: 譲れぬ未来のため
subtitles.english: For the sake of an unyielding future

subtitles.original: 浅い眠り続く黎明に
subtitles.english: In the dawn of continuing shallow sleep

subtitles.original: 独り祈り込めて 織り上げた
subtitles.english: Offering a solitary prayer, I wove this together

subtitles.original: 涙 蒼い雲に刻まれて
subtitles.english: My tears are engraved in the blue clouds

subtitles.original: 愛しあなたの影 追いかける
subtitles.english: Chasing after your beloved shadow

subtitles.original: 憎しみの炎渦巻く この地上で
subtitles.english: On this earth where flames of hatred swirl

subtitles.original: 汚れなき心 貫いてく
subtitles.english: Piercing through with a pure heart

subtitles.original: 熱き熱き誓い
subtitles.english: A burning, burning vow

subtitles.original: 瑠璃色に輝く 綺羅の瞳
subtitles.english: Eyes shining in lapis lazuli

subtitles.original: 闇よりの使いに 閉ざされても
subtitles.english: Even if they are sealed by messengers of darkness

subtitles.original: 繋いだ夢の橋 悠久に綴りゆく
subtitles.english: The connected bridge of dreams continues eternally

subtitles.original: 奏でる奇跡 きっと...
subtitles.english: Playing a miracle, surely...

subtitles.original: 可能性の兎
subtitles.english: [On-screen: The Rabbit of Possibility]

subtitles.original: 兎田ぺこら 変身まで
subtitles.english: [On-screen: Usada Pekora: Until Transformation]

subtitles.original: 未来ある若者の芽を摘むな！
subtitles.english: Don't nip the budding youth with a bright future!

subtitles.original: 後ろ向くなお前！前だけ見てろ人生！
subtitles.english: Don't look back! Keep looking forward in life!

subtitles.original: ぺこちゃんのことが、大好きです
subtitles.english: I love you, Peko-chan.

subtitles.original: 覚醒
subtitles.english: [On-screen: Awakening]

subtitles.original: 覚醒
subtitles.english: [On-screen: Awakening]

subtitles.original: Please hear me
subtitles.english: Please hear me

subtitles.original: I want to tell you
subtitles.english: I want to tell you

subtitles.original: Please sing to me
subtitles.english: Please sing to me

subtitles.original: I wanna hear your voice
subtitles.english: I wanna hear your voice

subtitles.original: 時の鼓動がまだ響く間
subtitles.english: While the heartbeat of time still echoes

responses.thoughts:
**Final Subtitle Generation Plan**

Okay, here's the plan. I'm taking this task and breaking it down meticulously. My primary focus is generating perfectly synchronized, contextually appropriate subtitles for a video containing a mix of Japanese vocals and on-screen text. No machine translation; I will render proper English translations. I will specifically avoid creating closed captions or ghost subtitles, meaning I won't subtitle silent sections unless there's on-screen text present.

First, I'm analyzing the video, which is a split: the first segment features a performance of "WILD EYES," followed by a transition sequence and finally, "RE:I AM." I will segment each portion meticulously.

I've already painstakingly transcribed and timed the lyrics for "WILD EYES". I will ensure that the English translations are contextually accurate and maintain the original intent, starting from the beginning. I'm focusing on perfectly matching lyrics and visual on-screen text with their precise start and end times in the `MM:SS.mmm` format. For the "WILD EYES" segment, I will precisely subtitle each line with the original Japanese alongside its English translation. The instrumental sections will be left untranslated.

Next, I will deal with the transition sequence. It appears to feature on-screen text, like "可能性の兎" (The Rabbit of Possibility), and spoken dialogue, like Pekora's countdown and Tokino Sora's (or whoever is speaking!) "ぺこちゃんのことが大好きです" (I love you, Peko-chan). All of these prominent visual elements and spoken lines will get their own subtitles, with precise timing.

Finally, the "RE:I AM" performance. I've listened closely to this section. I will meticulously time and translate the lyrics to perfectly align with what's being sung.

The crucial part will be the output. It is the final stage; I'll assemble everything into a well-structured array of subtitle objects (with "s", "e", "og", "en" keys). I will cross-reference the lyrics and translations, ensure the timestamp formats are correct, and double-check for any errors. And then, I'm ready to render the output with confidence.
